issue_title: Network statistics widget causes error message
issue_body_preview:
After updating just now (2014-02-12 7:30 am EST), reloading the page or refreshing the network statistics widget, always triggers this error popup:

```
The page at <ip_address> says:

DataTables warning (table id = 'netstat_dashboard'):
Requested unknown paremter '1' from the data source for
row 0
test_description_zh: 打开 Linux Dash 首页，等待页面加载完成，观察网络统计（Network Statistics / netstat）小部件是否正常渲染数据表格，尝试刷新该小部件或重新加载整个页面，观察是否出现弹窗或错误提示。
expected_result_zh: 网络统计小部件应正常加载并显示网络连接数据表格，刷新小部件或重新加载页面后不应弹出任何 DataTables 警告或错误弹窗，表格数据应完整正确地展示。
